name: ravine
hints: Down in the ravine. There's charcoal from the burned sagebrush and a mine entrance.
GET CHAR for sagebrush charcoal - it's an ingredient for making gunpowder.
GO MINE or GO ENTR to enter the mine. The mine has treasures and a candle.
GET CHAR (for gunpowder). GO MINE enters the mine (room 21). U=ridge (8).
notes: Ravine with charcoal (for gunpowder) and mine entrance (room 21). U=ridge (8).
